query:
SELECT mo.id, mo.name, mo.price, mo.menuItemId, mi.name as itemName, mi.categoryId, c.name as categoryName
FROM menu_options mo
JOIN menu_items mi ON mo.menuItemId = mi.id
JOIN categories c ON mi.categoryId = c.id
WHERE mi.name LIKE '%Tradicional%' OR mi.name LIKE '%Marmitex%' OR c.name LIKE '%Marmitex%'
ORDER BY mi.name, mo.name
LIMIT 50;
